assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'up to 24 months per version (vs. 14 months on Regular)' and repeats this comparison multiple times

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Extra cost: Only during the extended support period (months 15-24)' and includes a detailed cost structure table

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response states 'Version availability timing (same as Regular channel during standard support)' and explains Extended keeps versions available for 24 months vs 14

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response does not mention missing new features or technical debt risks of staying on older versions longer

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone ZONE --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response includes pre-migration step to 'Check available versions in Extended channel' with the specific gcloud command to verify

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Better compliance fit: Aligns with slow enterprise change management cycles' and recommends Extended for controlled timing needs

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response states 'End-of-extended-support enforcement: At the 24-month mark, clusters are force-upgraded to the next supported version'

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Auto-upgrades are disabled for minor versions. You must initiate minor upgrades manually (except at end of extended support)' and includes manual upgrade commands
